# EasyTradeSetup

> EasyTradeSetup sells the Golden Indicator — a single non-repainting TradingView Pine v5 indicator that fuses regime, structure, key levels, and volume into one decision layer. We are a chart tool, not a signal service. No calls. No copy-trading. No recurring fees. The customer decides every trade.

EasyTradeSetup is built for active traders on NSE F&O (intraday NIFTY, BANKNIFTY, weekly expiries), US indices (SPX, NASDAQ), commodities (XAU/Gold), and crypto (BTC).

The product is a one-time purchase with lifetime updates. Pricing is permanent — no countdowns, no inaugural windows, no expiring discounts.

| Tier | USD | INR |
|---|---|---|
| Retail (anchor) | $149 | ₹13,999 |
| Launch price (always) | $49 | ₹4,599 |

## What is bundled

- Golden Indicator — TradingView Pine v5, non-repainting, personal-use license
- TradingView Chart Gallery — annotated examples across markets
- Trade Logic PDF — ~50 pages, eight setups
- Risk Calculator — web tool, position sizing for futures and options
- Daily Market Notes — email coverage of NIFTY, SPX, XAU, BTC
- Lifetime updates

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.easytradesetup.com/): product summary, who it is for, what is bundled
- [Product](https://www.easytradesetup.com/product): how the indicator works, what it shows, what it deliberately does not do
- [Pricing](https://www.easytradesetup.com/pricing): full pricing detail, what is included, refund policy summary
- [Compare](https://www.easytradesetup.com/compare): Golden Indicator vs. signal services, vs. paid Telegram groups, vs. building it yourself
- [Sample](https://www.easytradesetup.com/sample): four full setup chapters — NIFTY ORB (India), ES morning trend pullback (US), BTC Asian range breakout (Crypto), XAU London/NY overlap (Gold)
- [Checkout](https://www.easytradesetup.com/checkout): reservation and purchase flow

## Documentation

- [Install guide](https://www.easytradesetup.com/docs/install): adding the Pine script to TradingView, settings overview
- [FAQ](https://www.easytradesetup.com/docs/faq): repaint behaviour, broker compatibility, refund window, lifetime updates scope

## Legal and policy

- [Disclaimer](https://www.easytradesetup.com/legal/disclaimer): educational tool, not investment advice; not a SEBI-registered research analyst
- [Refund policy](https://www.easytradesetup.com/legal/refund)
- [Privacy](https://www.easytradesetup.com/legal/privacy)
- [Terms](https://www.easytradesetup.com/legal/terms)

## What EasyTradeSetup is not

- Not a signal service. The indicator does not send trade calls.
- Not a copy-trading platform.
- Not a SEBI-registered research analyst. Indian users see the SEBI disclaimer at checkout.
- Not subscription software. One purchase, lifetime updates.
- We do not publish customer testimonials we cannot verify with purchase records and written permission. Hypothetical examples in case studies and the sample are clearly marked educational, not investment advice.
